currency.title: Global Real-time Exchange Rates
currency.desc: Utilizes Exchange Rate API to deliver real-time global currency conversion and dynamic currency switching.

wheel.title: Lucky Wheel
wheel.desc: A lucky wheel developed with native Canvas, featuring a prize history function.

products.title: E-commerce Store
products.desc: Integrates FakeStoreAPI for product data and manages shopping cart and authentication states via Pinia.

crypto.title: Price Trends
crypto.desc: Connects to CoinGecko API and uses ECharts to implement price trend visualizations and chart type toggling.
crypto.subtitle: Last 7 days price data from CoinGecko

scratch.title: Scratch Card
scratch.desc: A scratch card game built with native Canvas, supporting mouse and touch input, with win history tracking.
scratch.subtitle: Scratch three cards and test your luck!
